attributes.name: Slider
attributes.summary: The Slider Number Field provides a user interface component for selecting numerical values via a slider control. It supports customization options such as minimum and maximum bounds, decimal precision, and display prefixes or suffixes. The field offers visual feedback through inline display, progress bars, and optional value labels, enabling intuitive and adjustable input for numerical data within forms or interfaces. It includes embedded, atom, and editable variations to accommodate different presentation contexts.
